role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified Spanish text ('SE VENDE', 'SALIDA A DOS CALLES') and used it to distinguish Spain from other Spanish-speaking regions.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on architectural materials (brick, stone, tiles) and street layout, which are landscape/architectural cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Correctly noted the lack of vegetation and used the 'xeric' environment as a weak supporting signal.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Identified the STOP sign and Vienna Convention standards, correctly linking them to the region.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized the architectural style ('rejas', brickwork) to support the Spain hypothesis.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Spain. The linguistic agent provided the strongest evidence (Spanish text), which the meta and regulatory agents reinforced. The botanics agent was appropriately neutral due to lack of flora. The final reasoning correctly prioritized the linguistic evidence.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Text on wall matches image exactly.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Brick, stone, and tiles match image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: STOP sign visible in distance matches description.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Window grilles and wall styles match image.
